note: Sikora 2011 JBC V. cholerae T2S secretome; chitinase ChiA-1 (VC1952) listed in Table 1 as a T2S-secreted protein (chitinase was a previously confirmed Eps substrate). UniProt Q9KQP6=VC_1952 chitinase, N16961.

Sikora 2011 is the V. cholerae T2S secretome paper and discusses cholera toxin as the canonical Eps substrate, but states CtxA/B were NOT detected in this study (genes under strict regulation). Evidence here is contextual, not a direct assay in this paper. UniProt P01555=ctxA N16961 correct.
Same Sikora 2011 paper; CtxB likewise not experimentally detected in this study, only cited as known Eps substrate. UniProt P01556=ctxB N16961 correct.
Sikora 2011: hypothetical/lipoprotein VC2298 appears in iTRAQ Table 2, 3-5x higher in WT vs T2S-mutant supernatant. UniProt Q9KPR8=VC_2298 putative lipoprotein, N16961.
Sikora 2011: sialidase/neuraminidase (VC1784) in Table 1, ~4-6x enriched in WT supernatant by iTRAQ. UniProt P0C6E9=nanH sialidase N16961.

doi_resolves_to: The Type II Secretion System Delivers Matrix Proteins for Biofilm Formation by V. cholerae (Johnson 2014)
note: DOI resolves to Johnson 2014 JB showing T2SS delivers biofilm matrix proteins (RbmC) in V. cholerae; RbmC also in Sikora secretome (VC0930). UniProt Q9KTH2=VC_0930 (hemolysin-related/RbmC) N16961.
Sikora 2011: VesB (VC1200) is one of three serine proteases with CONFIRMED enzymatic activity and T2S-dependent transport. UniProt Q9KSQ6=VC_1200 trypsin/VesB N16961.
Sikora 2011: VesC (VC1649) confirmed T2S-dependent serine protease. UniProt Q9KRJ1=VC_1649 trypsin/VesC N16961.
Sikora 2011: GbpA (VCA0811) in Table 1, previously established Eps substrate. On chromosome 2 (NC_002506, VC_A locus) - correct. UniProt Q9KLD5=gbpA N16961.
Sikora 2011: HA/protease Hap (VCA0865) in Table 1, established Eps substrate. UniProt P24153=hap/vibriolysin VC_A0865 N16961.
Sikora 2011: cytolysin HlyA/VCC (VCA0219) in Table 1, ~4-6x enriched in WT supernatant. UniProt P09545=hlyA N16961.
Sikora 2011: hypothetical VCA0583 in Table 1 as new T2S substrate. UniProt Q9KM06=VC_A0583 (solute-binding family 3 domain) N16961.
Sikora 2011: hypothetical VCA0738 in iTRAQ Table 2, 3-5x higher in WT supernatant. UniProt Q9KLK5=VC_A0738 N16961.
Sikora 2011: leucine aminopeptidase Lap (VCA0812) in Table 1 as T2S substrate. UniProt Q9KLD4=VC_A0812 leucine aminopeptidase-related N16961 (gene labeled lapA; it is the Lap aminopeptidase).

Sikora 2011 names lipase as a previously known Eps substrate but explicitly states lipase was NOT detected under the conditions used in this study. No direct assay for LipA here. UniProt P15493=triacylglycerol lipase (hlyC/lipA) VC_A0221 N16961 correct.
Sikora 2011: TagA-related protein (VCA0148) in Table 1 as new T2S substrate. UniProt Q9KN18=VC_A0148 TagA-related N16961.
Sikora 2011: VesA (VCA0803) is the primary T2S-confirmed serine protease that processes cholera toxin A subunit. UniProt Q9KLE3=VC_A0803 serine protease N16961.

doi_resolves_to: Protein Secretion Systems in P. aeruginosa: diversity, evolution, function (Filloux 2011, REVIEW)
note: DOI resolves to Filloux 2011 Front Microbiol REVIEW, not a primary secretion assay. LapA/PA0688 (alkaline phosphatase, DING protein) is associated with the Hxc T2SS but this review only cites it; no experimental data in this paper. UniProt P35482=lapA PA0688 PAO1 correct.
Same Filloux review (not primary). CbpD/PA0852 is a known Xcp substrate but evidence is review-level here. UniProt Q9I589=cbpD PA0852 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review only. LasA (PA1871) is a recognized Xcp T2SS substrate but no primary assay in cited paper. UniProt P14789=lasA PA1871 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. LasB/elastase (PA3724) is the classic Xcp substrate but cited ref is a review. UniProt P14756=lasB/elastase PA3724 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. Lipase Lip (PA2862) Xcp substrate; review-level citation only. UniProt P26876=lip/lipA PA2862 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. LipC (PA4813) Xcp-secreted lipase; review citation. UniProt Q9HUZ7=lipC PA4813 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. Aminopeptidase PaAP (PA2939) Xcp substrate; review citation only. UniProt Q9HZQ8=lap/PaAP PA2939 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. Alkaline phosphatase H (PA3296) - review citation, no primary assay. UniProt P35483=phoA(H-AP) PA3296 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review (weak). CRITICAL: UniProt B1V8X4 does NOT match - it is asparagine-tRNA ligase (asnS) from Candidatus Phytoplasma australiense, not P. aeruginosa PlcB (PA0026). Wrong accession.
Filloux 2011 review. Hemolytic phospholipase C PlcH (PA0844) Xcp substrate; review citation. UniProt P06200=plcH PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. Non-hemolytic phospholipase C PlcN (PA3319) Xcp substrate; review citation. UniProt P15713=plcN PA3319 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. Protease IV/PrpL (PA4175) Xcp substrate; review citation. UniProt Q9HWK6=prpL/lysyl endopeptidase PA4175 PAO1 correct.
Filloux 2011 review. Exotoxin A (eta/toxA, PA1148) is the classic Xcp T2SS substrate but cited ref is a review, not primary. UniProt P11439=eta/exotoxin A PA1148 PAO1 correct (toxA is synonym).

doi_resolves_to: Spatial patterns of bacterial taxa in nature... 16S rRNA tree (Philippot 2009 Environ Microbiol)
note: DOI 10.1111/j.1462-2920.2009.02014.x resolves to an UNRELATED soil-ecology/16S paper (Philippot), nothing to do with Legionella T2SS. CelA/cellulase (lpg1918) is a genuine Lsp substrate in the literature but the cited DOI is wrong. UniProt Q5ZU89=lpg1918 cellulase Philadelphia-1 correct.

Same wrong DOI as R052 (Philippot soil ecology paper). LapA/leucine aminopeptidase (lpg2634) is a real Lsp T2SS substrate but DOI is wrong. UniProt Q5ZS85=lpg2634 leucine aminopeptidase Philadelphia-1 correct.

doi_resolves_to: Multiple Legionella T2 Secretion Substrates incl. a Novel Protein... (Tyson 2013 IAI)
note: Tyson 2013 IAI: NttA confirmed Lsp T2SS-dependent substrate, mutant impaired for amoebal infection. UniProt Q5ZVQ5=lpg1385 (NttA-domain protein) Philadelphia-1 correct.
Tyson 2013 IAI names NttB among T2S substrates confirmed by proteomic analysis of T2SS mutant. UniProt Q5ZWV7=lpg0978 Philadelphia-1 correct.

doi_resolves_to: Structure, Dynamics... Novel Substrates of the Legionella T2SS (Portlock 2020 Front Mol Biosci)
note: Portlock 2020 confirms NttE as Lsp T2SS substrate (prior proteomics of T2SS mutant) and solves its structure. UniProt Q5ZZ22=lpg0189 Philadelphia-1 correct.
Same wrong DOI as R052/R053. PlaA (lpg0926) is a documented Lsp T2SS substrate (Cianciotto lab) but the cited DOI points to an unrelated ecology paper. UniProt Q5ZX07=lpg0926 Philadelphia-1 correct.

doi_resolves_to: X. campestris pv. vesicatoria Secretes Proteases and Xylanases via Xps T2SS and OMVs (Sole 2015 JB)
note: Sole 2015 JB confirms a virulence-associated lipase (XCV0536) is Xps-T2SS-secreted, but also shows it appears in OMVs and Xps mutants retain partial secretion (indirect). UniProt Q3BY96 is now a DELETED/inactive entry (removed from reference proteome) though it historically was XCV0536 lipase. Accession no longer resolves.

doi_resolves_to: Studies on the Energetics of Proaerolysin Secretion across the Outer Membrane of Aeromonas (Letellier 1997 JBC)
note: Letellier 1997 JBC studies proaerolysin (aerolysin) secretion across the OM via the Exe T2SS - aerolysin is the canonical Aeromonas T2SS substrate. UniProt P09167=aerA aerolysin but organism listed only as A. hydrophila (no strain); genome ATCC 7966 is the species reference.

doi_resolves_to: Assembly of the T2SS: ExeA residues critical for peptidoglycan binding and secretin multimerization (Li 2010 JB)
note: Li 2010 JB is about the ExeA machinery (peptidoglycan binding/secretin assembly); it uses lipase secretion as a phenotypic readout but does NOT characterize Lip as a substrate per se. UniProt P40600=lip is from A. hydrophila strain H3, not ATCC 7966; genome is species reference.

doi_resolves_to: Transcriptional regulation of the Yts1 T2SS of Yersinia enterocolitica and identification of secretion substrates (Shutinoski 2010 Mol Microbiol)
note: Shutinoski 2010 directly shows ChiY secreted in a Yts1-T2SS-dependent manner. But UniProt A1JQR7 is a DELETED/inactive entry (removed from reference proteome); it historically mapped to YE3650, not the chiY chitinase. Note chiY and ye3650 (R063) share this same accession - likely a mapping error.

Shutinoski 2010 shows EngY (YE2830) is a Yts1-T2SS-dependent secreted substrate (chitin-binding). UniProt A1JU21 is now DELETED/inactive (not in reference proteome) though it mapped to YE2830/EngY. Accession no longer resolves.

Shutinoski 2010 shows YE3650 is Yts1-T2SS-dependently secreted (oligosaccharide-binding motifs). UniProt A1JQR7 is DELETED/inactive (UniParc UPI0000EB5F7C maps to YE3650). Accession obsolete; also duplicated with R061.

doi_resolves_to: Txc, a new T2SS of P. aeruginosa PA7... directs specific secretion of CbpE chitin-binding protein (Cadoret 2014 JB)
note: Cadoret 2014 JB demonstrates CbpE is secreted specifically by the Txc T2SS of PA7. But UniProt A6V5Q1 is a DELETED/inactive entry (removed from reference proteome); accession no longer resolves to PSPA7_3026/CbpE. Genome PA7 (NC_009656) correct.

doi_resolves_to: Type II Secretion-Dependent Degradative and Cytotoxic Activities Mediated by S. maltophilia Serine Proteases StmPr1 and StmPr2 (DuMont 2015 IAI)
note: DuMont 2015 IAI confirms StmPr1 is an Xps-T2SS substrate (genetic + secretion analysis) driving cytotoxicity. UniProt Q93IQ4=StmPr1 alkaline serine protease, S. maltophilia (Smlt0861); K279a genome correct.

doi_resolves_to: An extracellular zinc metalloprotease gene of Burkholderia cepacia (Corbett 2003 Microbiology)
note: Corbett 2003 clones zmpA and shows a zmpA mutant makes less protease, but only INFERS secretion via the general secretory pathway (homology to thermolysin family); no direct T2SS-dependence shown. UniProt Q7WSN3=zmpA but from B. cepacia strain Pc715j; genome J2315 is B. cenocepacia reference (paper used Pc715j/K56-2).

doi_resolves_to: The secretome of the plant pathogenic bacterium Erwinia chrysanthemi (Kazemi-Pour 2004 Proteomics)
note: Kazemi-Pour 2004 secretome proteomics of E. chrysanthemi (=D. dadantii) 3937 identifies Out (T2SS)-secreted pectinases including pectin acetylesterase PaeY. UniProt E0SAZ4=paeY pectin acetylesterase Dda3937_03373 strain 3937 correct.
Kazemi-Pour 2004 secretome maps Out-T2SS-secreted pectate lyases including PelA. UniProt P0C1A3=pelA pectate lyase A Dda3937_03370 strain 3937 correct.

doi_resolves_to: Specific interaction between OutD and secreted proteins of the general secretory pathway (Shevchik 1997 EMBO J)
note: Shevchik 1997 EMBO J studies OutD (T2SS secretin) interaction with Out-secreted pectate lyases including PelB; PelB is an established Out-T2SS substrate. UniProt E0SJQ6=pelB pectate lyase B Dda3937_04193 strain 3937 correct.

doi_resolves_to: External Loops at the C Terminus of E. chrysanthemi Pectate Lyase C Are Required for Species-Specific Secretion through the Out T2 Pathway (Lindeberg 1998 JB)
note: Lindeberg 1998 gives direct experimental data (hybrid-protein secretion assays in E. coli with cloned out genes) showing PelC is secreted via the Out T2SS. UniProt E0SJQ7=pelC pectate lyase C Dda3937_04192 strain 3937 correct.
Kazemi-Pour 2004 secretome identifies Out-T2SS-secreted pectate lyases including PelD. UniProt E0SAZ3=pelD pectate lyase D Dda3937_03372 strain 3937 correct.

doi_resolves_to: Extracellular secretion of pectate lyase by the E. chrysanthemi out pathway is dependent upon Sec-mediated export (He 1991 JB)
note: He 1991 JB studies PelE secretion via the Out (T2SS) pathway (Sec-dependent inner-membrane export then Out-mediated OM secretion). UniProt P0C1A5=pelE pectate lyase E Dda3937_03371 strain 3937 correct.

doi_resolves_to: Pectate lyase PelI of E. chrysanthemi 3937 belongs to a new family (Shevchik 1997 JB)
note: Shevchik 1997 JB states PelI is an extracellular protein secreted by the Out (T2SS) secretory pathway of E. chrysanthemi 3937. UniProt E0SM75=pelI Dda3937_00058 strain 3937 correct.

doi_resolves_to: PelN Is a New Pectate Lyase of Dickeya dadantii with Unusual Characteristics (Hassan 2013 JB)
note: DOI resolves to a paper primarily about PelN, not PelL. PelL is mentioned only as a known secreted PL9 endopectate lyase used for comparison; no PelL-specific secretion assay in this paper. UniProt P0C1A7=pelL pectate lyase L (Pel9A) Dda3937_02794 strain 3937 correct.

Kazemi-Pour 2004 secretome identifies Out-T2SS-secreted pectin methylesterase PemA among the extracellular pectinolytic enzymes. UniProt P0C1A9=pemA pectinesterase A Dda3937_03374 strain 3937 correct.
